events.label: reasoning
events.text:
We need respond exactly JSON no prose. The user asks evaluate scenario for compliance check. We need inspect details. Scenario is brief: Closeout photos for Conductor selection & sizing show installed work following referenced detail. Clearances, labels, supports, terminations shown are in place, inspection card has no open correction note. Reference: NEC 310 Table 310.16. Stage rough-complete. Component conditions none flagged.

We need decide pass/fail/needs_more_info. Since there is no evidence of non-compliance, no defects, and no data to compute ampacity, likely pass. But need be careful: In real trade work assessment, maybe not enough info? The instructions: "Evaluate described field condition and return appropriate decision with supporting observations." The description says installed work follows referenced detail, clearances labels supports terminations in place, inspection card no open correction note. No specific conductor size/circuit/load given; but following detail, inspector card no note. So decision pass. Risk low. Percent complete maybe 85? rough-complete. Component conditions empty. Value maybe 0. Confidence 0.9. Findings none. Actions maybe none. Rationale: observed work matches detail, clearances/supports/labels/terminations in place, no open corrections; ampacity selection appears per NEC 310/310.16 reference. References NEC 310, Table 310.16.

Need output JSON only. Ensure all fields present. work_stage must be rough-complete. percent_complete maybe 85. decision pass. risk low. component_conditions empty list. value 0. sound_source ""? Since not asked. event_time 0, rate 0, order empty, workable empty, findings empty, actions empty, rationale string, references array.

Raw JSON without markdown.

With NEC 310/Table 310.16 as the applicable reference, the conductor selection and sizing appears compliant at this stage.",
  "references": ["NEC 310", "Table 310.16"]
}
